entities.name: Data Flow Patterns
entities.context: Overarching framework describing how data moves through V's knowledge system

entities.name: Ingestion Pattern
entities.context: Pattern for bringing external data into the system through staging and processing

entities.name: Retrieval Pattern
entities.context: Pattern for finding and presenting stored knowledge via search

entities.name: Records/
entities.context: Staging directory for incoming external data before processing

entities.name: Knowledge/
entities.context: Storage location for processed, curated knowledge

entities.name: Lists/
entities.context: Storage location for structured list-based information

entities.name: Index
entities.context: Search index for knowledge retrieval and discovery

relationships.context: Ingestion is one of the core data flow patterns
Retrieval is one of the core data flow patterns
Records/ serves as staging area in ingestion flow
Processed data flows to Knowledge/ storage
Processed data flows to Lists/ storage
Ingested content gets indexed for retrieval
Retrieval queries the search index to find relevant files
